nodes.label: Tests for ConversationStore — directory-based conversation storage.  Tests cover
Build a minimal valid message dict.
Reset ConversationStore singleton before and after each test.
Create a ConversationStore backed by a temp directory.
Create a conversation and return (store, conv_id, user_id).
append_message is the single write path: per-message routing to     transcript /
CC writes a new <uuid>.jsonl per turn under     sessions/claude/<user>/<sanitize
extras is the single source of truth. A jsonl whose stem is         not in extra
Each CC session leaves a <sid>.jsonl AND a <sid>/ workdir         next to it. Bo
invalidate_claude_sessions must clear extras AND wipe all         jsonls + compa
If _cid_user has no owner for cid, skip disk wipe silently.
invalidate_claude_session_for_agent clears ONE agent's extra         and prunes
After compact, both <sid>.jsonl AND the <sid>/ workdir must         be reclaimed
